title: AKH® Silver Metal Wreath Hanger - 30 cm / 12" Length - Over The Door Wreath Hanger
features: The wreath hanger is constructed from durable metal and can be placed over most standard doors.
Heavy duty wreath hanger: Weight up to 20lbs.
Perfect for Hanging Christmas Wreath, Decorations, Clothes, Bags and Scarves.

SATISFACTION GUARANTEED - As a company, we put a premium on quality, and customer satisfaction. And that is why we only sell high-quality products that don't disappoint and are worth every penny you spent. But in the event that you are not completely satisfied with your purchase of our product, all you need to do is to send us an email and we will either send you a replacement, or give you a full refund.
